description: Recto: Court record. Location: Fustat. Dated: Monday 26 Ḥeshvan 1403 Seleucid, which is 1091 CE, under the authority of the Nasi David b. Daniel. Describing the procedure of the divorce process and the settlement between Yequtiel b. Moshe (the representative of the merchants) and Munā bt. Shemuel b. Naḥum. Probably a draft—messy writing and no signatures.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
